'''Rantorin''', also known as '''OM812''', was a barren rock [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with two [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. It occupied the second closest [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around the [[Red giant/Legends|red giant]] [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Thrantin Major]] in the [[Thrantin OM81-A system]], a part of the [[Ollonir Boundaries]]<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" /> in [[the Negs]] portion of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rantorin was first mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Thrantin OM81-A [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Rantorin, in grid square J-9.<ref name="TEA" />
